'''chadovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabboni|rabboni]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabboni|rabboni]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chadovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chædeveth|chædeveth]] || [[word:chædevej|chædevej]] || [[word:chædevesh|chædevesh]] || [[word:chædeve|chædeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadodovoth|chadodovoth]] || [[word:chadodovoj|chadodovoj]] || [[word:chadodovosh|chadodovosh]] || [[word:chadodovo|chadodovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadovoth|chadovoth]] || [[word:chadovoj|chadovoj]] || [[word:chadovosh|chadovosh]] || [[word:chadovo|chadovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadofvoth|chadofvoth]] || [[word:chadofvoj|chadofvoj]] || [[word:chadofvosh|chadofvosh]] || [[word:chadofvof|chadofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chadovotho|chadovotho]] || [[word:chadovojo|chadovojo]] || [[word:chadovosho|chadovosho]] || [[word:chadovoko|chadovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chadovoth|chadovoth]] || [[word:chadovoj|chadovoj]] || [[word:chadovosh|chadovosh]] || [[word:chadovo|chadovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chadovothol|chadovothol]] || [[word:chadovojol|chadovojol]] || [[word:chadovoshol|chadovoshol]] || [[word:chadovokol|chadovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chadovothotho|chadovothotho]] || [[word:chadovojojo|chadovojojo]] || [[word:chadovoshosho|chadovoshosho]] || [[word:chadovoko|chadovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chadovothon|chadovothon]] || [[word:chadovojon|chadovojon]] || [[word:chadovoshon|chadovoshon]] || [[word:chadovokon|chadovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chadovothoro|chadovothoro]] || [[word:chadovojoro|chadovojoro]] || [[word:chadovoshoro|chadovoshoro]] || [[word:chadovokoro|chadovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
